news.headline: Poll: Canadian Dollar forecasted to edge 0.5% higher to 1.43/USD in 3 months (vs 1.4034 in December poll)
IGT is first gaming supplier to achieve iCAP Ready Accreditation from NCPG for responsible gaming standards.
news.summary: IGT has been granted a new accreditation for maintaining top-notch responsible gaming standards in its iLottery operations. The accreditation, specific to the supplier, marks IGT as the first gaming industry supplier to receive such recognition. The announcement was made on January 9, 2025, in London. International Game Technology PLC, trading under the symbol NYSE: IGT, has shown a commitment to responsible gaming practices.

news.headline: Global light vehicle sales to reach 85.1 million units in 2025, up by 1.3% from 2024, as reported by MarketsandMarkets.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets revealed that global light vehicle sales reached 84.0 million units in 2024. Projections indicate a slight increase to 85.1 million units in 2025, representing a year-over-year growth of 1.3%. This growth in light vehicle sales highlights a positive trend in the automotive industry.

news.headline: Brookfield Asset Management renews bid to buy up to 37,123,295 shares, about 10% of its floating shares, until Jan 12, 2026.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. (NYSE: BAM, TSX: BAM) announced approval for the renewal of its normal course issuer bid, allowing the purchase of up to 37,123,295 Class A Limited Voting Shares, equivalent to approximately 10% of the company's outstanding Class A Shares public float. The purchases will occur on the NYSE, TSX, and/or alternative trading systems from January 13, 2025, to January 12, 2026. Brookfield Asset Management will acquire the Class A Shares at market price during this period, or at a permissible alternative price.

news.headline: Helen of Troy Limited to participate in ICR Conference 2025 in Orlando, Florida on Jan 13, 2025. CEO, CFO, and SVP attending.
news.summary: Helen of Troy Limited, known for its consumer home, outdoor, beauty, and wellness products, (NASDAQ: HELE) disclosed its involvement in investor gatherings and a fireside chat session at the ICR Conference 2025 in Grande Lakes Orlando, Florida on January 13, 2025. Key executives, including Chief Executive Officer Noel Geoffroy, Chief Financial Officer Brian Grass, and Senior Vice President Sabrina McKee, will be part of the event to discuss company strategies and financial insights.

news.headline: Cameco acknowledges Westinghouse President and CEO Patrick Fragman's resignation effective March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, Cameco (TSX: CCO; NYSE: CCJ) recognizes the significant contributions of Patrick Fragman as President and CEO of Westinghouse Electric Company. He has announced his decision to step down from his role at Westinghouse, effective March 31, 2025, to prioritize spending time with his family in Europe. Patrick has been at the helm of Westinghouse since 2019. Westinghouse, a prominent figure in the nuclear energy sector, is known for its innovative practices and leadership.

news.headline: First U.S. crypto tax evasion case results in a two-year prison sentence and $1M restitution for underreporting $4M Bitcoin gains. IRS sets precedent. Rogue crypto traders beware!
news.summary: The IRS and DOJ recently secured the first criminal tax evasion conviction focused on cryptocurrency, sentencing Frank Richard Ahlgren III to two years in prison and over one million dollars in restitution for underreporting gains from selling four million dollars worth of Bitcoin. Another case involving Roger Keith Ver, known as "Bitcoin Jesus," faces an eight-count federal indictment for tax evasion and other charges related to not paying "exit tax" on over one hundred thirty-one thousand Bitcoins. Ver could face up to 20 years per mail fraud count and significant prison time if convicted. These cases serve as a warning to taxpayers in the cryptocurrency arena to comply with tax laws, as the government is cracking down on crypto tax evasion. The IRS has expanded its investigation reach beyond U.S. borders with John Doe summonses and high-risk letters.

news.headline: Carter funeral unites political rivals at solemn event.
Investors rely on Trump outcome for bank stock justification as share prices hold steady.
Newly discovered indicator boosts Fed's confidence in inflation, sources revealed. Important for policy decisions.
Next Fed meeting unlikely to deliver fourth rate cut; impact on S&P 500 discussed. Check Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: The upcoming Federal Reserve meeting is predicted to not involve a fourth consecutive rate reduction. Investors are speculating on when the next rate decrease will occur and how it will impact the S&P 500. This information is crucial for market participants as it could potentially influence stock prices.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls amid Trump tariff news on stock market today. Nvidia rises ahead of Jensen Huang's CES speech. Palantir takes a hit.
news.summary: The stock market experienced a drop today as the Dow Jones declined in response to news of Trump's tariffs. However, Nvidia saw a surge in its stock ahead of CEO Jensen Huang's appearance at CES. The Dow Jones remained steady amidst this uncertainty. Palantir faced a decline in its stock value. This information is live coverage and was originally reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Nvidia stock surges above buy point, eyes record high as CEO Jensen Huang set to speak at CES tonight.
news.summary: Nvidia stock saw a significant increase above a key buy point on Monday, almost reaching a record high. The CEO of Nvidia, Jensen Huang, is scheduled to address an event later today. The surge in Nvidia stock took place in the Dow Jones Futures market. The information was highlighted in the post titled "Dow Jones Futures: Nvidia Surges Above Buy Point; Jensen Huang CES Speech In Focus" from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: EWR Digital introduces Structured Data Markup Service for SEO clients to boost search visibility, Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Houston, EWR Digital, a top digital marketing agency, announced the launch of its Structured Data Schema Markup Service within its Enterprise SEO offerings. This new service aims to improve search engine exposure for prominent companies and top industry players.

news.headline: Apogee Enterprises raises quarterly dividend to $0.26 per share, a 4% increase, payable on Feb 12, 2025. 12th consecutive year of dividend growth.
news.summary: Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) based in Minneapolis, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.26 per share, indicating a 4% boost from the previous payout of $0.25 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on February 12, 2025, to shareholders recorded on January 28, 2025. This decision demonstrates Apogee's commitment to consistent growth, marking the twelfth consecutive year of dividend increase. Over this period, the quarterly dividend has expanded by 18%.

news.headline: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) to discuss Q4 2024 results on Jan 30, 2025, released in advance, with webcast available.
news.summary: Trane Technologies plc (NYSE:TT), a leading global provider of climate solutions, is set to conduct a conference call regarding its financial performance in the fourth quarter of 2024 on Thursday, January 30, 2025, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). The company will release its earnings report and presentation for the fourth quarter ahead of the call, accessible on Trane Technologies' official website. The event will include a live listen-only webcast of the conference call online. The discussion will feature key insights on the company's financial results and future outlook.

news.headline: Trader defies UK gilt selloff with wager on five BoE rate cuts, compared to market pricing of just two.
ReNew Energy Global Plc achieves top rating among Indian renewable energy firms in S&P Global's Sustainability Assessment.
news.summary: In Gurugram, India, ReNew Energy Global Plc has achieved the top ranking for a pure-play renewable energy firm within the Indian power industry. The company received the highest score among its peers.

news.headline: Westinghouse CEO Patrick Fragman to step down in March 2025 after 5 years. Dan Sumner appointed Deputy CEO.
news.summary: In CRANBERRY TOWNSHIP, Pa., the President and CEO of Westinghouse Electric Company, Patrick Fragman, will step down at the end of March 2025 after over five years in the role. Fragman's decision to resign is to allow him to spend more time with his family in Europe. Post his official departure on March 31, he will aid in the transition to the incoming CEO for a few additional months. Dan Sumner, the former President of Operating Plant Services, has been appointed as the Deputy CEO with immediate effect and will eventually assume the position of CEO.

news.headline: Academy Securities appoints Randy Lauer as new Head of Fixed Income after serving 3 years as Managing Director.
news.summary: Academy Securities, a pioneering veteran-owned investment bank in the US, has named Randy Lauer as its new Head of Fixed Income. Lauer, who previously held the position of Managing Director at Academy for 3 years, notably contributing as the Head of Business Development & Institutional Sales. In this role, he significantly aided in enlarging the firm's client roster and reinforcing crucial partnerships with institutional parties.

news.headline: Ituran to participate in conferences on Jan 14 & 16, 2025. Will attend Needham Growth Conference & Freedom Israel Opportunities Event.
news.summary: Scheduled to participate and engage with potential investors at the Needham Growth Conference on Tuesday, January 14 and the Freedom Israel Opportunities Event on Thursday, January 16, will be Ituran Location and Control Ltd. (Nasdaq: ITRN), a prominent company in the field of vehicle telematics. The events will take place in Azour, Israel, commencing on January 9, 2025. Known for its cutting-edge technology solutions, Ituran Location and Control Ltd. will be showcasing its offerings and connecting with stakeholders at these important industry gatherings.

news.headline: Thermoplastic Polyurethane Adhesive Market set to reach $1.41 billion by 2029 - MarketsandMarkets™ Report.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on January 9, 2025, a report was released on the Thermoplastic Polyurethane Adhesive Market. The report covers various types of adhesives including Hot Melt Adhesives and Solvent-based Adhesives. It focuses on different applications such as Granular, Powder, and Liquid adhesives, and highlights their use across industries like Packaging, Textile, Consumer Goods, and Automotive. The report provides a global forecast for the market, considering key factors such as market share, growth potential, and regional trends.

news.headline: Arizona Sonoran receives C$19.9 million strategic private placement from Hudbay for 11,852,064 common shares.
news.summary: CASA GRANDE, Arizona and TORONTO - ASCU recently revealed that Hudbay has agreed to purchase 11,852,064 common shares of the Company in a non-brokered private placement, amounting to approximately C$19,911,467.

news.headline: Nano-encapsulated Additives Market to reach US$ 10,090.2 million by 2034, growing at 7.9% CAGR. Valuation of US$ 4,697.0 million in 2024. Industry growing due to advanced performance features and demand for eco-friendly solutions.
news.summary: The global Nano-encapsulated Additives Market is estimated to reach US$ 4,697.0 million in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 7.9% from 2024 to 2034, eventually reaching US$ 10,090.2 million. This growth is driven by the increased usage of nano-encapsulated additives in various industries such as pharmaceuticals, food & beverages, agriculture, and coatings due to their enhanced performance features like stability, controlled release, and focused delivery. The technology effectively encapsulates active components, protecting them from degradation and improving their performance in different applications. The market growth is also fueled by the rising demand for innovative product formulations, sustainability, and efficiency in industries. Businesses in this sector are expanding their operations to meet the diverse requirements of individual projects. North America is a significant region in this market, estimated to hold a market share of 33.6%.

news.headline: Epson partners with Kitchen Armor to enhance TrueOrder Kitchen Display Solution for mid-sized chains. Star date: Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: Epson has unveiled a collaboration with Kitchen Armor, the top restaurant technology provider, aiming to introduce cutting-edge, user-friendly technology suitable for mid-sized chains and independent owners. This partnership, revealed in Los Alamitos, Calif. on January 9, 2025, seeks to empower smaller restaurants to enhance their competitive edge against larger chain competitors. This initiative promises to deliver state-of-the-art solutions that are easy to install, ensuring that establishments have access to advanced tools to boost their operations.

news.headline: Microsoft plans to invest $3 billion in AI, cloud expansion, and training in India, aiming to train 10 million individuals and back AI startups.
news.summary: In India, Microsoft plans to bolster its AI and cloud footprint by providing training to a whopping 10 million individuals by the year 2030. The tech giant also aims to offer support to AI startups as part of its expansion strategy in the country.

news.headline: British market sees continued decline, pound hits 1-year low.
Blue Point Capital Partners acquires Warren Heim Corp, known for insulated bags for utility workers. BUZZLINE® brand emphasized.
news.summary: In Cleveland, Blue Point Capital Partners and portfolio company National Safety Apparel (NSA) have acquired Warren Heim Corporation, a U.S. manufacturer of insulated bags for electrical utility workers. Headquartered in Fort Pierce, Florida, Warren Heim is known for the BUZZLINE® brand, showcasing their family-owned company's legacy in craftsmanship. This strategic acquisition adds to NSA's offerings and expands its market reach.

news.headline: DLR Group highlights design trends for 2025, focusing on innovative solutions shaping the industry's future.
news.summary: Seattle-based DLR Group, a global integrated design firm, has released its predictions for 2025 trends in the industry. The report delves into innovative design solutions that are expected to have a significant impact on the future of the sector.

news.summary: Discover how to easily purchase USDC on the Base Network through a detailed walkthrough. This guide provides a comprehensive overview, detailing the process of setting up wallets, acquiring USDC tokens, and seamlessly bridging to the Base Network. Don't miss out on this opportunity to engage with the burgeoning ecosystem of the Base Network.

news.summary: The Nomination Committee at Kaldalón plays a crucial advisory function in appointing the Company’s Board of Directors and proposing candidates for board positions. Comprehensive information regarding the Nomination Committee's responsibilities and procedural guidelines can be accessed on Kaldalón's official website.

news.headline: UK Treasury Minister Jones: Our absolute focus is securing growth.
Investing £130 million/year in tech for UK schools could lead to £8.7 billion economic benefit in 10 yrs - Pearson & Cebr.
news.summary: In London on January 9, 2025, it was reported that an estimated annual investment of around £130 million in technology for schools for the next ten years could result in an economic gain of up to £8.7 billion for the UK. It is projected that for every £1 spent on technology in schools, there could be a return of up to £7.90.

news.headline: UK Chief Secretary to the Treasury Jones: This is not austerity.
Ship & Boat Building Market to hit US$527.61B by 2034; 11.1% CAGR growth forecasted. Increased demand in multiple maritime sectors. Shipyards in Asia and Europe booming, creating job opportunities.
news.summary: The global Ship & Boat Building Market is projected to reach US$183.69 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 11.1% between 2024 and 2034, reaching a valuation of US$527.61 billion by the end of 2034. The industry is experiencing significant growth due to increased demand in various maritime sectors, including container ships, specialized vessels for offshore wind farms and LNG transportation, cruise ships, military vessels, and fishing fleet modernization. Shipyards in Asia, especially in China, South Korea, and Japan, are reporting full order books extending into 2026. European shipbuilders are also seeing increased demand for specialized vessels and luxury yachts. Job opportunities and technological innovations in automation and environmental sustainability are on the rise. The industry growth reflects the crucial role of maritime transport in global commerce and various economic sectors. Key takeaways include the South Korean market expanding at a CAGR of 12.9%, the East Asian market reaching US$446.42 billion by 2034, and the Mexican market advancing at a 5.6% CAGR in North America by 2034.

news.headline: Wishpond files patent for enhanced state manager technology to improve real-time interactions with SalesCloser AI virtual agents.
news.summary: A patent application has been filed by Wishpond for its advanced enhanced state manager technology in Vancouver, BC. This new technology is aimed at enhancing interactions with SalesCloser AI virtual agents by adapting to real-time cues and recalling past conversations. This innovation is expected to significantly improve complex conversations and elevate the user experience.

news.headline: RBC and Cohere team up to create secure generative AI for financial services. Partnership aims to develop cutting-edge solutions.
news.summary: In Toronto on January 9, 2025, RBC (known as TSX: RY and NYSE: RY) disclosed a collaboration with Cohere, a top company in security and privacy-centric enterprise AI. Together, they are working on creating and securely implementing an enterprise generative AI (genAI) solution specifically designed for the financial services sector.

news.headline: Target is increasing its wellness products with 2,000 new items, over 600 exclusive, most under $10. Discovery journey expanded.
news.summary: Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) unveiled over 600 exclusive wellness products available only at Target stores. The range includes functional beverages, hair health essentials, and innovative wellness technology. This launch aims to assist consumers in exploring new options throughout their wellness journeys. The announcement was made in Minneapolis on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Toys for Tots reflects on 2024, brought smiles and hope to millions of kids nationwide. Renewed commitment for the new year.
news.summary: In Triangle, Virginia on January 9, 2025, the Marine Corps Reserve Toys for Tots Program looks back on the impact made in 2024 by bringing smiles and hope to millions of disadvantaged children nationwide. Through the generosity of donors, including X amount of toys donated, the program helped spread joy during the holiday season.

news.headline: FusionIQ had a successful year in 2024, winning three industry awards and appointing Sloan Shanahan as Chief Revenue Officer.
news.summary: FusionIQ, a prominent wealthtech company based in Woburn, Massachusetts, declared on January 9, 2025, the appointment of Sloan Shanahan as their Chief Revenue Officer in an effort to enhance growth and innovation within the company. The firm, known for its cloud-based wealth management solutions, experienced notable success in reaching major milestones.

news.headline: HBC & HBC Financial Services merge with Coldstream, bringing total assets to $11.1 billion. Expansion in Pacific Northwest.
news.summary: A company is further expanding in the Pacific Northwest by partnering with a Seattle-based Certified Public Accountant and Registered Investment Advisor. This collaboration has led to Coldstream's assets under advisement reaching $11.1 billion. The partnership was announced on January 9, 2025, in Seattle.

news.headline: 2025 homebuyers prioritize move-in-ready homes, willing to compromise on desired features. Key features include bedrooms, garage, en-suite; proximity to work is important.
news.summary: With soaring home prices and a scarcity of housing options, potential homebuyers are willing to make concessions to secure a property. Key factors in deciding on a home include the number of bedrooms, availability of a garage, and a primary en-suite bathroom. Additionally, being close to work is crucial for many buyers. A gourmet or modern kitchen and a well-kept home are also significant considerations for individuals looking to purchase.

news.headline: Anton Chashchin wins Mastercard EDGE 2024 Award for FacePass-AMIO innovation; a highlight of 2024. Affero start of 2025.
news.summary: In London on January 9, 2025, the Mastercard EDGE Award for FacePass-AMIO developed by Anton Chashchin continues to be a standout accomplishment from 2024. Anton Chashchin, recognized as an advisor, philanthropist, and innovative business figure, received the prestigious Mastercard EDGE 2024 Award for his contributions.

news.headline: Panera introduces new Asiago Bagel Stacks in 3 varieties for $7.99, also free bagel for MyPanera guests.
news.summary: To celebrate National Bagel Day, MyPanera customers can now receive a complimentary bagel when they purchase the new Asiago Bagel Stack at Panera Bread. The promotion is valid for a limited time and allows guests to enjoy the new sandwich. The Asiago Bagel Stack is part of a new menu item at Panera, offering customers a flavorful option. This promotion is available to MyPanera members and is set to run until Jan. 9, 2025. Don't miss out on this opportunity to savor a delicious combination of flavors with Panera's latest offering.

news.headline: 24 Hour Fitness provides full club access to Los Angeles residents affected by wildfires. Open locations offer space for recovery.
news.summary: Amidst the destructive wildfires in Southern California, 24 Hour Fitness facilities in the area are providing shelter for the community. This initiative aims to assist individuals in regaining stability during this challenging period. The facilities in CARLSBAD, Calif. have opened their doors for those seeking respite. This gesture showcases solidarity with the affected individuals in Los Angeles.

news.headline: Beyond Identity launches new channel program to enhance partner business growth, appoints Joel Vinocur as Senior Director.
news.summary: Today, Beyond Identity, a top cybersecurity company, has appointed Joel Vinocur as Senior Director of Channels to enhance partner profitability. The firm is renowned for its robust identity and access management (IAM) platform. The announcement comes as Beyond Identity unveils its latest channel initiative in New York on January 9, 2025. This move aims to further solidify partnerships and drive revenue growth.

news.headline: Realtor.com predicts top markets for first-time homebuyers in 2025 - Harrisburg, Penn. leading the list. #RealEstate #2025MarketPrediction
news.summary: For individuals new to homeownership, Harrisburg, Pennsylvania should be the primary location to consider. A recent report has revealed that in 2025, first-time homebuyers should focus their search on the Mid-Atlantic region and Florida. This information was shared on January 9, 2025 from Santa Clara, California. The report provides insights on the top destinations for new homeowners, with Harrisburg standing out as a promising location for those looking to start their homeowner journey.
